applicationNote: Apply through the myNSFAS portal at www.nsfas.org.za before the national closing date.

additionalFunding.name: SU Rector's Award
additionalFunding.criteria: Exceptional matric (90%+); subject requirements per faculty

additionalFunding.name: SU Merit Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: APS 38+; strong academic record in relevant subjects

additionalFunding.name: SU Sport Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: National colours or Maties team representative

additionalFunding.name: SU Equity Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Black African, Coloured or Indian students with financial need
